variants: Quetzal Tapia is an expert in ethnomusicology, continually exploring the rich interplay between music and culture. He is a dedicated member of the Crystal Forge Masons, where he engages with fellow enthusiasts. His academic journey was significantly guided by his mentor and doctoral advisor, Jawad Zamani. Quetzal's substantial contributions to the field have been bolstered by funding from the Heathen Reel Grants, which support his creative projects. Additionally, he holds a Mana Stream Pilot Card, affirming his diverse qualifications and competencies.
